class.name: rover_science_hmi/ScienceModule
class.description: Science subsystem control: sequences, valves, pump, carousel, dispensing, OSF, and utilities

class.name: rover_science_hmi/SciencePipelineModule
class.description: Science pipeline timeline: 4-step workflow tracker from drilling to analysis

class.name: rover_science_hmi/ScienceAnalysisModule
class.description: Science instrument readouts: spectrophotometer chart, NPK probe, fluorometer, gas sensor
